text: Hello friends, Welcome to Gate Smashers Next example is, construct a DFA which accepts a language of all strings which must start with A and end with B Means all the strings in the language all those strings should start with A and end with B Now if you want to design a DFA like this I have discussed the same example earlier You have to follow the same method And why is it important? Because in all the competitive exams If we talk about your college or university level exam DFA designing is one of the most important topic of TOC And the more examples you do, the more benefits you will get Otherwise you have to apply logic Because it is a logical question There is no theoretical concept behind it You have to apply logic And you can solve it logically easily So this is very important for your academic and competitive exams So again the same method What is the first step? You have to write the language Now which all languages will come? Language means collection of strings Means which all strings will come in it Which should start with A and end with B So which string will come from minimum to minimum? A, B Because it can't be less than A, B If you write, let's suppose Epsilon So neither A nor B comes in Epsilon If you write A alone So it is partially true Starting with A but it becomes ending with A, B But we have a question Starting with A, ending with B B alone can't come So which will come from minimum to minimum? A, B So after this you can increase as much as you want Like A, B, A, B You can make as much as you want like this Apart from this, let's suppose if I write A multiple times After that I write B multiple times So this type of strings will also be accepted If I write, let's suppose B, A Will it be accepted? No You just have to put a simple logic That A should come in starting B should come in ending So if we design this DFA So how do we design DFA? First you design the minimum to minimum string Now in minimum to minimum string Single A and single B should come So how will you design? Q0 What is your starting state? Q0 From Q0, if you go to A Let's suppose if you apply single A Because we have alphabets in this question A and B There are two alphabets A and B If you apply A Means in this state If you apply A If you apply A alphabet Then your transition Means you will reach to which state? You will reach to Q1 So should my Q1 be final? It shouldn't be because B hasn't come yet Now if you apply single B on Q1 Then you will reach to Q2 And what you make Q2? Make it final state So look A and B are accepted A and B You are single So neither make a loop Because if you make a loop Then loop means multiple times But first of all you have to accept minimum string So which is the minimum? A and B Now what is the simple step? Filling the blanks Filling the blanks means Q0 went here on A Where will it go on B? Where will Q1 go? And where will Q2 go on A and B? You just have to fill the blanks Now look at Q0 here A should come in starting But if B comes in starting Then what should happen? If B comes in starting Then you trap it Means you put it in end state So what did you do to trap? You made a new state Q3 And Q3 is a trap So what is the meaning of trap? It will go on itself for A and B What is the meaning of trap? It cannot go anywhere else You have given it a punishment That you go here Now you cannot go anywhere from here Because it will go on itself for A and B Now as soon as B comes in starting Let's suppose as soon as B comes As soon as B comes You trapped it Now it cannot go anywhere from there Neither it can go here Nor can it go anywhere Because it will go on itself on A and B So you filled this Q0 You filled it on A and B Now we come to Q1 Q1 will go here on B But it cannot go on A Either you can trap it If you trap it on A Then problem can come Problem can come How? Let's suppose if you trapped it If you trapped it on A And string came AAB Can it come? It can come AAB can come Yes AABBB can come Multiple can come So starting with A Ending with B But A A See how you have to run First A came here Second A As soon as it comes You reached the trap B B So where did you get stuck? You got stuck in the trap state So this was not accepted But this should be accepted So your DFA That is not the right design So you do not put it in the trap state So if you do not put it in the trap state Then what will you do? What are the other options? What are the other options you have? You can send it back If you send it back So can there be any problem? If you send it back Obviously to send it back You do not need to make a loop What do you do directly? Make a loop at this place Simple If you make a loop at this place So let's suppose if I talk A A A B If you make it like this Let's suppose A A A B So if you send it back So what will happen? A If you did not make a loop And if you send it back So what will happen? A A A And B This is accepted But let's suppose if you put 4 times A If you put 4 times A So A A And A And next came B As soon as next B comes Obviously it will not be accepted How? You have to run it simply A single came Next A came and you went here Third A came and you went here Fourth A came and you went here Now next B came If B comes then you will go to trap state Obviously you will go to trap state But if you look at this string carefully Starting with A Yes Ending with B Yes So this should be accepted But this is not accepted Why? Because you sent it back You sent back A So instead of sending it back What do you do? Make it a loop Because as many times it comes We don't have any problem Because in the last only B will come Now see A A A B So this string is now accepted So you just have to apply this logic So this will easily be your DFA Last is your Q2 Now look at Q2 Q1 will be final on A and B Q2 is for B For B there is a simple logic You make a loop for B Because A, B Now after B, as many times B comes Will there be any problem? No In the last only B came So make a loop for B The problem is for A Now if you put A in trap state Again the same problem that we have discussed here If you put it in trap state Then again what will be the problem? Let's suppose A, B A, B The string comes like this And what did you do? You put it in trap state Now what will happen? A, B, A, B So this is not accepted But A, B, A should also be accepted Because starting with A Ending with B So you cannot put it in trap What is the second option? You send it back on Q0 If you send it back on Q0 Then what will happen? A, B, A, B This is also not accepted A, B, A should also be accepted But A, B, A and B This is not accepted So you don't have to apply this logic Which logic do you have to apply? Simply send it to this state Simple Now see A, B, A, B Any string that comes starting with A Ending with B This DFA will accept it So this is how you have to design the DFA Which is starting with A Ending with B Thank you
